description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Embedded build that triggers on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for RaspberryPi64 and another commented out for RaspberryPi and RaspberryPi tests. For RaspberryPi64, use an ubuntu-latest environment with an archlinux container, install git, checkout code with submodules, install dependencies, build, deploy, and upload a tar.gz artifact. Additionally, create a GitHub release with the uploaded artifact.
